name: Search/custom-search-param
description: Custom SearchParameter registration conformance tests (from CustomSearchParamTests): invalid SearchParameter definitions (bad FHIRPath, non-existent target property, invalid base/type, missing required fields, type/expression mismatch) are rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error. The MS FHIR Server-specific 128-character SearchParameter.url length cap is covered separately in Microsoft/ms-search-parameter-url-length.json.

resource.name: Fhir262BadSyntax
resource.description: Invalid: expression is not valid FHIRPath syntax.

resource.name: Fhir262WrongProperty
resource.description: Invalid: expression references a property ('foo') that does not exist on Encounter.diagnosis.

resource.name: Fhir262InvalidBase
resource.description: Invalid: base contains 'foo', which is not a valid resource type.

resource.name: Fhir262InvalidType
resource.description: Invalid: type is 'foo', which is not a valid SearchParamType.

resource.name: Fhir262MissingBase
resource.description: Invalid: base is empty, but base has cardinality 1..*.

resource.name: Fhir262MissingExpression
resource.description: Invalid: expression is an empty string.

resource.name: Fhir262MissingType
resource.description: Invalid: type is an empty string, but type has cardinality 1..1.

resource.name: Fhir262UnsupportedType
resource.description: Invalid: type is 'quantity', but the expression (Encounter.diagnosis.condition) resolves to a reference, not a quantity.

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: bad FHIRPath expression syntax is rejected
test.description: A SearchParameter whose expression is not valid FHIRPath ('bad syntax') must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention the invalid search parameter definition (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: expression references a non-existent property
test.description: A SearchParameter whose expression is Encounter.diagnosis.foo ('foo' does not exist on Encounter.diagnosis) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention Encounter.diagnosis.foo (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: invalid base resource type
test.description: A SearchParameter with base=['foo'] ('foo' is not a valid resource type) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention 'foo' is not a valid resource type (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: invalid search parameter type
test.description: A SearchParameter with type='foo' ('foo' is not a valid SearchParamType) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention 'foo' is not a valid SearchParamType (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: missing base (empty array)
test.description: A SearchParameter with base=[] (base has cardinality 1..*) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention cardinality (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: missing expression (empty string)
test.description: A SearchParameter with expression='' must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention the expression is not supported (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: missing type (empty string)
test.description: A SearchParameter with type='' (type has cardinality 1..1) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention cardinality (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: type incompatible with the expression's target (unsupported type)
test.description: A SearchParameter with type='quantity' but an expression (Encounter.diagnosis.condition) that resolves to a reference, not a quantity, must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/ignixa-sp-unsupportedtype (type='quantity' on a reference expression)

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention the type is not supported (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

operation.description: Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-badsyntax (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-wrongproperty (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-invalidbase (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-invalidtype (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-missingbase (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-missingexpression (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-missingtype (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-unsupportedtype (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
